articles.title: adidas Introduces the F1-Adapted CLIMACOOL SYSTEM for World Cup 2026
articles.summary: Summaryadidas unveils CLIMACOOL SYSTEM with vest, jacket and overshoe to combat extreme heat at FIFA World Cup 2026Technology lowers core body temperature and improves enduranceThis innovation joins federation kits, TRIONDA ball and F50 Hyperfast Evo bootsadidas has unveiled the CLIMACOOL SYSTEM, a performance innovation designed to help athletes withstand the high temperatures expected at the FIFA World Cup 2026.Originally developed for motorsport drivers, the system has been adapted for football through extensive testing with clubs like Manchester United, Juventus and Arsenal. articles.title: Onitsuka Tiger Goes Independent From ASICS
